name: Indian Biological Data Centre (IBDC)
organization: Department of Biotechnology, Government of India
description: India's national life-science data centre and entry point for biological data archives, submission services and controlled-access resources.

name: GenomeIndia
description: A national programme cataloguing genetic variation across diverse Indian population groups. Access conditions are defined by the programme and its designated data infrastructure.

name: IndiGenomes
organization: CSIR-Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology
description: A searchable resource of genetic variants observed in more than one thousand Indian genomes. Public exploration is available, while licensing or other conditions may apply to some downstream uses.

name: National Institute of Biomedical Genomics
organization: Department of Biotechnology, Government of India
description: National research institute focused on biomedical genomics, disease biology, statistical genetics and population-scale genomic research.

name: CSIR-Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology
organization: Council of Scientific and Industrial Research
description: Research institute working across genomics, molecular medicine, public-health genomics and computational biology.

name: NCBI Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO)
organization: US National Center for Biotechnology Information
description: Public functional-genomics repository containing array- and sequence-based studies. Omics Bharat can search GEO live through NCBI E-utilities.

name: NCBI Sequence Read Archive (SRA)
organization: US National Center for Biotechnology Information
description: Archive of raw high-throughput sequencing data. Search results may include open and controlled-access studies.

name: ClinVar
organization: US National Center for Biotechnology Information
description: Public archive of relationships among human genetic variants and health conditions, with supporting evidence and review status.

name: dbSNP
organization: US National Center for Biotechnology Information
description: Reference archive for short genetic variants and their identifiers, placements and submitted observations.

name: Europe PMC
description: Biomedical literature search, open-access full text and links between publications, grants and biological data. Omics Bharat searches it live.

name: BioStudies
description: Repository for data and files associated with life-science studies, including supplementary material that may not fit a domain archive.

name: PRIDE Archive
description: Public repository for mass-spectrometry proteomics data, including peptide and protein identifications.

name: MetaboLights
description: Cross-species repository for metabolomics experiments and derived information.

name: MGnify
description: Analysis and discovery platform for microbiome and metagenomic datasets from many environments and hosts.

name: NHGRI-EBI GWAS Catalog
description: Curated genome-wide association study results with traits, variants, ancestry information and summary statistics where available.

name: Expression Atlas
description: Curated baseline and differential expression results across organisms, tissues, diseases and experimental conditions.

name: Reactome
description: Curated pathway knowledgebase with analysis and visualization tools for gene and protein lists.

name: Open Targets Platform
description: Evidence platform connecting diseases, phenotypes, genes, proteins, pathways, drugs and genetic associations for target prioritisation.

name: Genome Aggregation Database (gnomAD)
description: Large population-frequency reference for human genetic variation. Population labels must not be treated as a substitute for India-specific evidence.

name: International Genome Sample Resource
description: Maintains and extends the 1000 Genomes Project resources, including South Asian population data useful as a broad reference.

name: ICMR Ethical Guidelines
description: Official ethics resources for biomedical and health research involving human participants in India. Researchers should use the latest applicable guidance and institutional ethics review.

name: Digital Personal Data Protection framework
description: Government source for India's personal-data protection framework. Genomic and health-data projects should obtain legal and ethics advice for their specific use case.

name: Global Alliance for Genomics and Health
description: Open standards, policy frameworks and technical specifications for responsible genomic and health-data sharing.

name: FAIRsharing
description: Searchable registry of data standards, databases and policies that helps researchers choose community metadata and reporting standards.
